collections.name: Banned & Challenged Literature
collections.description: Literature with a documented history of suppression, prohibition, removal, or challenge.

collections.name: Essential Literature
collections.description: High-impact works selected for literary and historical importance.

collections.name: Suppressed Knowledge
collections.description: Material likely to be restricted or controlled by an authoritarian regime because it supports independent thought, private communication, resistance to coercion, critique of authority, media literacy, or preservation of disfavored history.

collections.name: Preparedness & Field Manuals
collections.description: Fieldcraft, repair, food, shelter, navigation, and other practical continuity references.

collections.name: Practical Library
collections.description: Public-domain practical references for household, workshop, farm, and outdoor use.

collections.name: Original-Language Library
collections.description: Works retained with their source-language editions alongside available translations.

collections.name: Open-Distribution Library
collections.description: Copyrighted works included under an explicit redistribution license or permission.

collections.name: Essential Reading
collections.description: A thematic reading list. A work may also be locally included under a compatible distribution basis.
